articles.title: Should Shubman Gill take over Virat Kohli's No. 3 spot in ODIs?
articles.description: Shubman Gill has made rapid strides in world cricket, especially in the 50-over format. He has decent numbers in the other two formats as well, but in ODI cricket, he is class personified.
